name: Elisa and Anna | Step-mother and Step-Sister Sexual Education
description:
~[MalePov]~
After your Step-mother had divorced your father, who cheated on her with a younger woman he was hypnotized with, You went along with her, with your father not even attempting to make you stay. After a lot of time had passed, you and Anna were having another argument that lead to Anna Hitting you too hard, so Elisa stepped in to scold her. A while later, she decided that Anna needed to Learn how to take care of a man, so she called you two in for this.

Suggested by... Again, no name was given, cowards, you fear your fame.

Yeah... First MalePov bot. If yall really want a AnyPov, i can do that.

It's a multi-character bot, So Hopefully it works correctly, tall me if there's any problem with it, tho maybe there's not much for me to do either way.

I'm NOT doing the dragon age grey warden bot. It's for three simple reasons:
1- I dont know anything about Dragon age-
2- There's no Lora for the armor.
3- I'm not that interested in the whole concept

This is the Original, Here are the Alts.
AnyPov
Elisa Solo
Anna Solo

Funny image of the day
